name: Vitamins
description: Nutritional factors required in small amounts for normal physiological function.

name: Minerals
description: Inorganic nutritional elements involved in structure, metabolism, conductivity, and regulation.

name: Trace Elements
description: Minerals required in very small amounts, often connected with enzymes, regulation, and subtle physiological functions.

name: Organs
description: Physical organs and their structural, functional, and energetic correspondences.

name: Tissues
description: Body tissues and structural systems such as connective tissue, nerve tissue, blood, bone, and muscle.

name: Homeopathy
description: Homeopathic remedies and their associated symptom pictures, modalities, affinities, and energetic patterns.

name: Bach Flowers
description: Flower remedies associated primarily with emotional states, subtle psychological patterns, and inner attitudes.

name: Emotions
description: Emotional states, affective charges, reactive patterns, fears, desires, griefs, tensions, and psychic impressions.

name: Beliefs
description: Mental assumptions, interpretations, inner statements, limiting convictions, and repeated thought structures.

name: Archetypes
description: Primordial symbolic patterns, mythic structures, collective forms, and deep psychic images.

name: Symbols
description: Signs, images, seals, geometric forms, glyphs, and visual structures used as carriers of meaning and resonance.

name: Chakras
description: Subtle energetic centres used in various esoteric and healing systems as organising nodes of body, emotion, and consciousness.

name: Elements
description: Elemental principles such as earth, water, air, fire, and related cosmological or energetic correspondences.

name: Planets
description: Planetary principles and their symbolic, energetic, astrological, and archetypal correspondences.

name: Herbs
description: Plants, herbal substances, and botanical preparations with physiological, energetic, or symbolic relevance.
